result.summary: Found several visual issues, mainly horizontal clipping/overflow and content being obscured by the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: The horizontal category menu near the top is clipped on the right; the 'Hot Games' tab is only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the tab row has proper horizontal scrolling behavior with padding/fade indicators, or resize tabs so the active viewport does not cut labels abruptly.

issues.description: Game cards in the right column are cut off by the edge of the screen across multiple sections, making the layout look broken or horizontally overflowing.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the game grid/carousel widths for this viewport. If it is intended to be a carousel, add clear scroll affordance and consistent side padding; otherwise constrain cards to fit within the viewport.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game tiles, cutting off visible content near the bottom of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content equal to the height of the bottom nav so cards are not hidden behind it.

issues.description: Some carousel/game tiles are partially visible without a clear visual cue that they are intentionally scrollable, which can look like accidental cropping.
issues.suggestion: Use consistent carousel peek spacing, a fade gradient, or scroll indicators to communicate that more content is available horizontally.
